Game.Name: Seifuku Densetsu Pretty Fighter (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Seifuku Densetsu: Pretty Fighter ("School Uniform Legend: Pretty Fighter") is a fighter for the Super Famicom originally released in 1994. It features an all-female cast of eight fighters, most of which wear a specific uniform and are associated with a specific color. The game contains various salacious references though nothing overtly pornographic.Seifuku Densetsu: Pretty Fighter received an enhanced remake for the Sega Saturn in 1995 called Seifuku Densetsu: Pretty Fighter X which added new characters and features like anime-style animated cutscenes.CharactersThe original SNES Pretty Fighter has eight playable characters. Their surnames each contain a specific color which is also used to represent them.Marin Aoki: A schoolgirl wearing blue ("Ao"). Considered the main character of the series.Kris Shiratori: A pink-haired nurse that fights with doctor's tools. Her associated color is white ("Shira").Jyuri Akasaka (Juri): Marin's close friend who moonlights as an exotic dancer and often has to deal with unruly customers. Her moveset is similar to Marin's. Juri's color is red ("Aka").Keiko Konno (Kei): A police officer who fights with standard cop gear. Her associated color is navy blue ("Kon").Ryouko Kiori (Oryou): A tall college student who loves wearing traditional Japanese clothes. Her associated color is yellow ("Ki").Minami Midorikawa: A student of an expensive private school who considers herself Marin's rival. Has a mop of hair and a green uniform. Her color is green ("Midori").Ai Momoyama: A blonde gymnast who wears knee- and shoulder-pads and fights using aerobics and exercise moves. Her associated color is pink ("Momo").Yawara Yamabuki: A cat-like judo warrior who fights while crouched and is determined to prove herself as the strongest warrior. Her associated color is golden yellow.
Game.Notes: 8 beautiful fighters must compete against one another to prove that they are indeed the most beautiful warrior in the world. Do you have what it takes to defeat the challenger?
